steps.title: Undo multiplication by 10
steps.content: The equation is $10x=86$. Divide both sides by $10$ to isolate $x$: $$x=\dfrac{86}{10}.$$

steps.title: Write the value cleanly
steps.content: $\dfrac{86}{10}=8.6$, so the solution is 8.6. The equivalent fraction $\dfrac{43}{5}$ would represent the same value. A quick check is $10(8.6)=86$, which matches the original equation.
